name: Possessed Resonance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>共</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon 1 "Charmer" or "Familiar-Possessed" monster with the same Attribute from your hand, Deck, or GY in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, then you can change the targeted monster to face-down Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster you control; change its battle position. You can only use each effect of "Possessed Resonance" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon 1 "Charmer" or "Familiar-Possessed" monster with the same Attribute from your hand, Deck, or GY in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, then you can change the targeted monster to face-down Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster you control; change its battle position. You can only use each effect of "Possessed Resonance" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
